name: Shen Yao Holdings Limited
summary: Shen Yao Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration and mining of gold deposits. It holds interests in the Castlemaine Goldfields covering an area of approximately 350 square kilometers in Victoria, Australia. The company was formerly known as LionGold Corp Ltd and changed its name to Shen Yao Holdings Limited in December 2020. Shen Yao Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Singapore.
